cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.2.3)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "/Users/Ozordi/Downloads/LibertyRecomp/glue/rexglue-sdk-main/thirdparty/sdl2/cmake")
set(_CMAKE_CHECK_ENABLED_LANGUAGES "C;CXX")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER "/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID "Clang")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_VERSION "21.1.8")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER "/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang++")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID "Clang")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_VERSION "21.1.8")

project(CheckOBJC LANGUAGES OBJC)
file(WRITE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/result.cmake" "set(CMAKE_OBJC_COMPILER \"${CMAKE_OBJC_COMPILER}\")
")
